name: libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl
title: libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl
summary: module to provide information on conflicts for Module::Runtime
description:
module to provide information on conflicts for Module::Runtime
Module::Runtime::Conflicts provides conflicts checking for Module::Runtime,
which had a recent release that broke some versions of Moose. It is called
from Moose::Conflicts and moose-outdated.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl because module to provide information on conflicts for Module::Runtime.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmodule-runtime-conflicts-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
